vulnerability.reference: Predictable emotion-based filtering allows malicious actors to craft bypassing content.
vulnerability.generated: Platform operators depend solely on the emotional conditioning pipeline for content moderation, lacking safeguards against distribution-shift failures.

impact.reference: Wider dissemination of disinformation and extremist material, degrading public discourse.
impact.generated: Harmful content bypasses moderation, exposing users to toxic material and eroding platform integrity.

dose_response.reference: Predictable emotion-based filtering enables adversarial bypass, causing platform operators’ tools to miss harmful content, resulting in wider dissemination of disinformation and extremist material, degrading public discourse.
dose_response.generated: A self-supervised emotional conditioning pipeline’s context-brittle ethical guardrails, when platform operators depend solely on them without distribution-shift safeguards, allow harmful content to bypass moderation, exposing users and eroding platform integrity.
